section_id: Section on Special Recruitment Authority Conditions
title: Conditions for Issuance of a Special Recruitment Authority
content: Special Recruitment Authority shall be issued subject to the conditions that recruitment activities outside the registered office of the agency shall be conducted only at venues authorized by the Administration, and under the supervision by the Administration, the DOLE, or the appropriate local government unit.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
